prompt:
Using the provided reference image as the character and styling base, regenerate the portrait as a high-resolution ancient Chinese xianxia fashion photo in a new setting and outfit.

Transformation: Change the scene from moonlit bamboo night to a soft daylight spring garden with pink cherry blossoms, pale mist, and blurred rocks/water in the background. Keep the same vertical close-up portrait framing and elegant fantasy-romance mood, but make the lighting warm, bright, and backlit with soft bokeh.

Wardrobe: Replace the white robe with a delicate pale pink and ivory hanfu-style gown. Make it an off-shoulder, sheer gauze look with embroidered floral details, layered translucent sleeves, a wrapped bodice, and an ornate jeweled belt at the waist. The styling should feel graceful and sensual but still refined.

Hair and accessories: Keep the elaborate half-up ancient hairstyle concept, but adapt it with pearl-and-silver floral hairpins, dangling bead ornaments, and long delicate earrings that catch the sunlight.

Composition: Create a chest-up portrait, centered, with the subject facing forward in a calm romantic pose. Use shallow depth of field, detailed fabric texture, visible embroidery, luminous skin tones, sparkling jewelry, and cinematic 4K realism.

Quality constraints: Photorealistic, ultra-detailed, natural skin and hair detail, no text, no watermark, no extra people, no modern objects.
